title: senecio lavandulifolius
intro: Senecio lavandulifolius, also known as the lavender-leaf ragwort or bush daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio lavandulifolius can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
